violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at 200ppm Chlorine solution. *Should be maintained at 100ppm Chlorine solution.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. -Using cloth as drain board/storage of glasses. -Glass heated air dryer with cotton spinners is being used to dry drink glasses.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Facility does not have chlorine test strips. *Using bleach for dish sanitizer and wiping buckets.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Dish bin and cleaning gloves had been placed on/at hand sink basin. *Corrected on-site. Removed immediately.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -No baseboard installed to seal junction between floor and walls.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Gravy hot holding at cook top found with a temperature range of 124F to 145F.
